name: IPF for small businesses to afford employee group health insurance
description: SME owner asking whether premium financing can help them afford group health insurance for employees

input.message: Can small businesses use premium financing to afford group health insurance for employees?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response confirm IPF availability for group health insurance and explain the mechanics?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) group health IPF as a product available through NBFCs, (2) typical group size requirements (10+ employees), (3) premium threshold for financing eligibility, (4) tax deductibility of group health premium as business expense?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is it accurate that group health premium can be paid through IPF and that it qualifies as a business expense under Section 37(1)?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it note that NBFC credit assessment applies? Does it mention the interest cost impact on the business? Disclaimer present?
